revision.text:
'''己亥'''（つちのとい、きがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて36番目で、前は[[戊戌]]、次は[[庚子]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は水で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==己亥の年==
==己亥の日== ===[[選日]]=== 己亥の日は[[天一天上]]の7日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''己亥'''（つちのとい、きどのいのしし、きがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの36番目で、前は[[戊戌]]、次は[[庚子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==己亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って39が余る年が己亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[39年]] *[[99年]] *[[159年]] *[[219年]] *[[279年]] *[[339年]] *[[399年]] *[[459年]] *[[519年]] *[[579年]] *[[639年]] *[[699年]] *[[759年]] *[[819年]] *[[879年]] *[[939年]] *[[999年]] | *[[1059年]] *[[1119年]] *[[1179年]] *[[1239年]] *[[1299年]] *[[1359年]] *[[1419年]] *[[1479年]] *[[1539年]] *[[1599年]] *[[1659年]] *[[1719年]] *[[1779年]] *[[1839年]] *[[1899年]] *[[1959年]] | *[[2019年]] *[[2079年]] *[[2139年]] *[[2199年]] *[[2259年]] *[[2319年]] *[[2379年]] *[[2439年]] *[[2499年]] *[[2559年]] *[[2619年]] *[[2679年]] *[[2739年]] *[[2799年]] *[[2859年]] *[[2919年]] *[[2979年]] |}
==己亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[10月]]が己亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己亥の日== 己亥の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己亥の日は[[天一天上]]の7日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:己亥]]

==己亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って39が余る年が己亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[39年]] *[[99年]] *[[159年]] *[[219年]] *[[279年]] *[[339年]] *[[399年]] *[[459年]] *[[519年]] *[[579年]] *[[639年]] *[[699年]] *[[759年]] *[[819年]] *[[879年]] *[[939年]] *[[999年]] | *[[1059年]] *[[1119年]] *[[1179年]] *[[1239年]] *[[1299年]] *[[1359年]] *[[1419年]] *[[1479年]] *[[1539年]] *[[1599年]] *[[1659年]] *[[1719年]] *[[1779年]] *[[1839年]] *[[1899年]] *[[1959年]] | *[[2019年]] *[[2079年]] *[[2139年]] *[[2199年]] *[[2259年]] *[[2319年]] *[[2379年]] *[[2439年]] *[[2499年]] *[[2559年]] *[[2619年]] *[[2679年]] *[[2739年]] *[[2799年]] *[[2859年]] *[[2919年]] *[[2979年]] |}
==己亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[10月]]が己亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己亥の日== 己亥の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己亥の日は[[天一天上]]の7日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:己亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:己亥]] [[Category:New]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig also known as 己亥'''（つちのとい、きどのいのしし、きがい）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの36番目で、前は[[戊戌]]、次は[[庚子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==己亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って39が余る年が己亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[39年]] *[[99年]] *[[159年]] *[[219年]] *[[279年]] *[[339年]] *[[399年]] *[[459年]] *[[519年]] *[[579年]] *[[639年]] *[[699年]] *[[759年]] *[[819年]] *[[879年]] *[[939年]] *[[999年]] | *[[1059年]] *[[1119年]] *[[1179年]] *[[1239年]] *[[1299年]] *[[1359年]] *[[1419年]] *[[1479年]] *[[1539年]] *[[1599年]] *[[1659年]] *[[1719年]] *[[1779年]] *[[1839年]] *[[1899年]] *[[1959年]] | *[[2019年]] *[[2079年]] *[[2139年]] *[[2199年]] *[[2259年]] *[[2319年]] *[[2379年]] *[[2439年]] *[[2499年]] *[[2559年]] *[[2619年]] *[[2679年]] *[[2739年]] *[[2799年]] *[[2859年]] *[[2919年]] *[[2979年]] |}
==己亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[10月]]が己亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己亥の日== 己亥の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己亥の日は[[天一天上]]の7日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:己亥]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Earth Pig]]

==己亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[10月]]が己亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己亥の日== 己亥の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己亥の日は[[天一天上]]の7日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:己亥]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Earth Pig]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]] [[sn:Yin Earth Pig]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq---qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:己亥]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Earth Pig]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]] [[af:Waterhaas (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Hasenei]][[en:Water Rabbit]][[fr:Lièvre de eauboishak]][[it:Ding-chṳ́id]][[ja:Dingmaoja]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Wasser-Haseni]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:D" to "[[sn:"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|旧暦|1=" to "|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq="
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|丙}}" to "|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Earth Pig-->[[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Earth Pig-->[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:己亥]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:in Earth Pig]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]] [[af:Waterhaas (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Hasenei]][[en:Water Rabbit]][[fr:Lièvre de eauboishak]][[it:Ding-chṳ́id]][[sn:ingmaoja]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Wasser-Haseni]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|亥}}" to "|亥|1=Pig (zodiac)|lt=Pig (亥)}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥|1=Pig (zodiac)|lt=Pig (亥)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Earth Pig-->[[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:己亥]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Earth Pig-->[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:己亥]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Earth Pig}}[[Category:qq]] [[sn:in Earth Pig]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]] [[af:Waterhaas (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Hasenei]][[en:Water Rabbit]][[fr:Lièvre de eauboishak]][[it:Ding-chṳ́id]][[sn:ingmaoja]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Wasser-Haseni]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥|1=Pig (zodiac)|lt=Pig (亥)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|陰陽五行思想}}" to "|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥|1=Pig (zodiac)|lt=Pig (亥)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥|1=Pig (zodiac)|lt=Pig (亥)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥|1=Pig (zodiac)|lt=Pig (亥)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Sexagenary Cycle]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:己亥]]
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] <!--Yin Earth Pig-->[[Category:己亥]][[Category:己亥]]<!--Yin Earth Pig-->[[ja:己亥]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]][[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Earth Pig}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Earth Pig]][[Category:11]] [[sn:in Earth Pig]] [[ja:己亥]][[zh:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[fr:Cochon de terre]][[de:Erde-Schwein]] [[af:Waterhaas (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Hasenei]][[en:Water Rabbit]][[fr:Lièvre de eauboishak]][[it:Ding-chṳ́id]][[sn:ingmaoja]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Wasser-Haseni]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|戊戌|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|庚子|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=draft|12=draft}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Hai|ja|亥|1=Pig (zodiac)|lt=Pig (亥)|12=draft|12=draft}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|ja|水|12=draft|12=draft}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|12=draft|12=draft}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Earth Pig == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[39]] * [[99]] * [[159]] * [[219]] * [[279]] * [[339]] * [[399]] * [[459]] * [[519]] * [[579]] * [[639]] * [[699]] * [[759]] * [[819]] * [[879]] * [[939]] * [[999]] | * [[1059]] * [[1119]] * [[1179]] * [[1239]] * [[1299]] * [[1359]] * [[1419]] * [[1479]] * [[1539]] * [[1599]] * [[1659]] * [[1719]] * [[1779]] * [[1839]] * [[1899]] * [[1959]] | * [[2019]] * [[2079]] * [[2139]] * [[2199]] * [[2259]] * [[2319]] * [[2379]] * [[2439]] * [[2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[2919]] * [[2979]] |}
== Months of the Yin Earth Pig == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the {{ill|October|ja|10月|12=draft|12=draft}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Lidong|ja|立冬|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue|ja|大雪|12=draft|12=draft}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Earth Pig == === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=draft|12=draft}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとい}} <!--Yin Earth Pig--><!--Yin Earth Pig-->

Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904335]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904335]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh min nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh_yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904335]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля --> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh_yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904335]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische (水)|qq=}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (水)|qq=}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.
