==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh_min_nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh_yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904335]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ ==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ <!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Pig== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:39|39]] * [[:en:99|99]] * [[:en:159|159]] * [[:en:219|219]] * [[:en:279|279]] * [[:en:339|339]] * [[:en:399|399]] * [[:en:459|459]] * [[:en:519|519]] * [[:en:579|579]] * [[:en:639|639]] * [[:en:699|699]] * [[:en:759|759]] * [[:en:819|819]] * [[:en:879|879]] * [[:en:939|939]] * [[:en:999|999]] | * [[:en:1059|1059]] * [[:en:1119|1119]] * [[:en:1179|1179]] * [[:en:1239|1239]] * [[:en:1299|1299]] * [[:en:1359|1359]] * [[:en:1419|1419]] * [[:en:1479|1479]] * [[:en:1539|1539]] * [[:en:1599|1599]] * [[:en:1659|1659]] * [[:en:1719|1719]] * [[:en:1779|1779]] * [[:en:1839|1839]] * [[:en:1899|1899]] * [[:en:1959|1959]] | * [[:en:2019|2019]] * [[:en:2079|2079]] * [[:en:2139|2139]] * [[:en:2199|2199]] * [[:en:2259|2259]] * [[:en:2319|2319]] * [[:en:2379|2379]] * [[:en:2439|2439]] * [[:en:2499|2499]] * [[2559]] * [[2619]] * [[2679]] * [[2739]] * [[2799]] * [[2859]] * [[:en:2919|2919]] * [[:en:2979|2979]] |}
==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Lidong]] to the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Earth Pig== === Selection Days === Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Months of Yin Earth Pig== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:October|October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. Wikidata name: Yin Earth Pig
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Years of Yin Earth Pig==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong|1=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Years of Yin Earth Pig==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong|1=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong|1=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong|1=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.
